content:
# Best AI Code Assistants for Beginners in 2026

Learning to code is challenging, but AI code assistants make it easier and more fun. Let's explore the best tools for beginners!

Check out our [[link:/category/Code|Code category]] for more tools.

---

## [[link:/tools/7|GitHub Copilot]]: The Industry Standard

[[link:/tools/7|GitHub Copilot]] is the most popular AI code assistant, and it's free for students!

### Why Copilot for Beginners?
- **Code suggestions**: As you type, Copilot suggests what to write next
- **Learning tool**: See real examples of how code works
- **Multiple languages**: Supports Python, JavaScript, and dozens more
- **Free for students**: Get it free with your school email

---

## [[link:/tools/13|Cursor]]: Built for Learning

[[link:/tools/13|Cursor]] is an AI-first IDE designed with learning in mind. It explains code in plain English and helps you understand what you're building.

### Cursor for Beginners
- **Plain English explanations**: Ask questions and get answers
- **Chat with your code**: Have a conversation about your project
- **Easy to use**: Simple interface designed for beginners

---

## Comparison Table

| Tool | Best For | Price |
|------|----------|-------|
| [[link:/tools/7|GitHub Copilot]] | General coding | $10/mo (free for students) |
| [[link:/tools/13|Cursor]] | Learning & understanding | $20/mo (free tier available) |
| [[link:/tools/202|CodiumAI]] | Testing & code quality | $19/mo (free tier available) |

---

## Our Recommendations

- **Just starting out**: Try [[link:/tools/13|Cursor]] free tier
- **Learning programming**: Start with [[link:/tools/7|GitHub Copilot]] (free for students!)
- **Building projects**: Use both [[link:/tools/7|Copilot]] and [[link:/tools/13|Cursor]]

Ready to start coding with AI? Try these tools today!

For more insights, check out [[link:/blog/best-ai-code-tools-for-freelance-developers-2026|Best AI Code Tools for Freelance Developers]]
